title: hookera capitata
intro: Hookera capitata, also known as New Zealand parsley fern, is a type of flowering plant native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Hookera capitata include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve menstrual cramps, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Hookera capitata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine in New Zealand.
